description: Defines the core business objectives and unique brand identity to ensure a consistent 5-star guest experience.
`MKT-001__ADR_Research__v1__2026-04-03.md`: ADR Research. - Analyzes Average Daily Rates of comparable local listings to establish a baseline for competitive and profitable pricing.
`MKT-002__Comp_Set_Occupancy_Research__v1__2026-04-03.md`: Occupancy Research. - Evaluates seasonal occupancy trends in the Austin area to forecast booking volume and revenue potential.
`MKT-003__Seasonality_Research__v1__2026-04-03.md`: Seasonality Analysis. - Identifies peak demand periods and off-season dips to optimize pricing strategies throughout the calendar year.
`MKT-004__Booking_Window_Research__v1__2026-04-03.md`: Booking Window Analysis. - Tracks how far in advance guests book their stays to help refine last-minute discount and early-bird strategies.

`MKT-005__Amenity_Demand_Research__v1__2026-04-03.md`: Amenity Demand Analysis. - Determines which features guests value most in Austin rentals to prioritize investments in high-impact property upgrades.

`MKT-006__Channel_Mix_Research__v1__2026-04-03.md`: Channel Mix Analysis. - Evaluates the performance of different booking platforms like Airbnb and VRBO to optimize listing visibility and distribution.
Enables continuous monitoring of competitor performance and market shifts to maintain a leading edge in the local Austin STR sector.

Monitors actual expenditures against initial estimates for budget categories `BUD-001_Variance_Compliance_Execution_Prompt.md` through `BUD-007_Contingency_Buffer_Execution_Prompt.md` to ensure financial discipline and ROI.

Maps critical milestones for project phases `TIM-001_Design_Theme_Lock_Execution_Prompt.md` through `TIM-007_Go_Live_Readiness_Execution_Prompt.md` to guarantee a timely and organized property launch.

Identifies potential operational and financial threats `RSK-001_Compliance_Delay_Review_Execution_Prompt.md` through `RSK-005_Slow_Booking_Pace_Review_Execution_Prompt.md` and outlines proactive mitigation strategies to protect the investment.
Tracks adherence to project schedules and budget variances on a weekly basis to maintain momentum and accountability.
Documents precise room dimensions to ensure all furniture and decor selections fit perfectly within the home's layout.
Visualizes the spatial arrangement of the 6 core zones to maximize guest flow, comfort, and functional utility.
Establishes a cohesive aesthetic and functional standard that aligns with the property's high-end Austin branding.
Provides detailed setup and configuration instructions for every space to ensure consistent quality and design integrity across the property.
Lists approved textures, colors, and surfaces to maintain a premium and durable look throughout the interior.
Outlines technical requirements for different zone types to streamline the design and procurement process for future modifications.
Maps specific design themes to each room to create a curated and memorable narrative for the guest's stay.
Defines the exact color palettes, lighting, and materials required to execute each room's theme with professional precision.
Provides a final list of styling tasks to ensure the property is visually perfect and ready for professional photography.
Specifies the exact placement of every decor item to maintain the intended aesthetic across different cleaning and turnover cycles.
Tracks the sourcing and purchase status of theme-specific items to ensure a complete and on-brand interior.
Sets the requirements for a safe and inclusive environment that meets or exceeds industry standards for high-end rentals.
Monitors the implementation and maintenance of safety features and accessibility improvements across the property.

Records official sign-offs for critical design phases `AP-001_Layout_Signoff_Gate_Execution_Prompt.md` through `AP-006_Final_Property_Design_Release_Gate_Execution_Prompt.md` to ensure all stakeholder requirements are met.

Serves as a final audit log for tasks `PR-001_Front_Entryway_Photo_Readiness_Execution_Prompt.md` through `PR-010_Covered_Patio_Photo_Readiness_Execution_Prompt.md` to guarantee the property is 100% ready for its hero shots.
Defines the scale and dimension requirements for major furniture pieces to ensure they complement the property's architectural layout.
Tracks the real-time sourcing and delivery status of essential items `INV-001_to_007_Master_Inventory_Execution_Prompt.md` through `INV-007 ` to keep the furnishing phase on track.
Manages communication and scheduling with furniture sellers and delivery services to streamline the procurement workflow.
Documents the progress and costs associated with DIY or upcycled furniture pieces to add unique, sustainable character to the home.

Records detailed order status and financial data for items `PR-001_Front_Entryway_Photo_Readiness_Execution_Prompt.md` through `PR-007_Secondary_Bedroom_2_Photo_Readiness_Execution_Prompt.md` to maintain strict budget oversight.
Monitors the condition and arrival of shipped goods to quickly resolve any damage claims or delivery discrepancies.
Provides a comprehensive final list of all physical assets within the property for insurance and management purposes.
Centralizes warranty information and coverage dates for all electronic and high-value items to simplify future maintenance and repairs.
Serves as the foundation for a professional, guest-facing manual that explains how to use the property's various amenities.
Manages the critical final 30 days of preparation to ensure a smooth and successful entry into the Austin market.
Monitors the progress of site preparation and utility setups to guarantee all systems are functional before the first guest arrives.
Tracks the configuration and connectivity status of smart home hardware like locks, thermostats, and noise monitors for seamless remote management.
Provides a physical sign-off sheet for each zone to verify that every room is fully set up according to the design plan.
Conducts a comprehensive readiness audit to score the property's overall preparedness for live bookings.
Outlines the necessary staging steps to ensure the home looks impeccable for its professional marketing content.
Specifies the exact photographs and videos required to showcase the property's best features and unique Austin character.
Defines the high-level standards for asset integrity and operational excellence to sustain a premium guest experience over time.
Centralizes all standard operating procedures for turnovers, maintenance, and guest issues to ensure consistent and scalable management.
Establishes the "Day Zero" reset requirements that cleaning teams must meet to maintain a pristine, 5-star environment.
Provides a granular, room-by-room guide for cleaning teams to ensure no detail is missed during the property reset.
Manages inventory levels for consumables like toiletries and coffee to prevent stockouts and ensure guests have everything they need.
Tracks the sourcing and procurement status of linens, towels, and bulk goods to maintain high operational standards.

Monitors compliance with recurring operational tasks `OPS-001_Post_Checkout_Audit_Prompt.md` through `OPS-008_Preventive_Safety_Check_Execution_Prompt.md` to ensure no maintenance or safety checks are skipped.
Maintains a curated list of trusted local vendors and their contact information for reliable property support and repairs.
Outlines secure procedures for managing vendor entry using smart locks to protect the property while facilitating necessary work.
Records and triages property issues and guest complaints to ensure rapid resolution and continuous service improvement.
Serves as the final validation step before a guest arrives to confirm the property is in perfect condition.
Provides a streamlined, mobile-friendly tool for cleaning teams to verify core tasks are completed on busy turnover days.
Outlines the core pillars of the "Frictionless Austin Retreat" to deliver a superior and memorable guest journey.
Visualizes every stage of the guest experience from booking to review to identify opportunities for delight and friction reduction.
Provides a comprehensive physical guide located in the property to help guests easily navigate and enjoy their stay.
Offers a convenient, branded way for guests to instantly connect to the high-speed internet without manual password entry.
Ensures both guests and hosts have immediate access to critical contact information for any urgent property or safety issues.
Informs guests about essential safety procedures and the location of emergency equipment like fire extinguishers and first aid kits.
Delivers clear, platform-specific instructions to guests to ensure their arrival and departure are smooth and stress-free.
Provides guests with a minimal and reasonable set of tasks to perform before leaving to assist with the turnover process.
Monitors the successful delivery and use of access codes to ensure guests never face entry delays or security issues.
Tracks the functional status and guest satisfaction levels for key amenities `AM-001_to_018_Amenities_Validation_Execution_Prompt.md` through `AM-018 ` to prioritize improvements.
Standardizes professional communication across the entire guest lifecycle to maintain a consistent and high-end brand voice.
Manages the integration of message templates into the property management system for automated and timely guest interaction.
Defines the proactive steps and response patterns required to maintain a 4.9+ star rating on major booking platforms.
Establishes a formal system for capturing and analyzing guest feedback during their stay to resolve issues before they become negative reviews.
Maintains a prioritized list of future property improvements based on guest requests and market trends to stay competitive.
Defines the visual storytelling pillars that differentiate the property in the crowded Austin short-term rental market.
Identifies the most impactful visual assets to lead the property's online presence and capture guest interest instantly.
Manages the production and selection of high-quality media assets `PV-001_to_035_Photo_Pipeline_Execution_Prompt.md` through `PV-035 ` for all marketing channels.
Contains professionally written, data-backed text that highlights the property's unique features and local Austin appeal.
Ensures all technical requirements and content gates are met before going live on major booking platforms.
Provides the rules and best practices for optimizing listing titles, descriptions, and image captions for maximum search visibility.
Tracks the usage and effectiveness of specific Austin-related keywords `KW-001_to_015_SEO_Implementation_Execution_Prompt.md` through `KW-015 ` to drive organic traffic.
Establishes the strategic guardrails for using discounts and special offers to boost bookings during low-demand periods.
Monitors the performance and ROI of active marketing promotions `PRM-001_to_005_Promotions_Velocity_Execution_Prompt.md` through `PRM-005 ` to refine future strategies.
Outlines controlled experiments for testing different listing titles and hero images to data-optimize conversion rates.
Focuses on achieving a balanced yield between high occupancy and premium daily rates to maximize total property income.
Maps out critical Austin events like SXSW and ACL to ensure the property is priced appropriately for high-demand periods.
Establishes the standard foundational rates for weekdays and weekends to provide a consistent pricing baseline.
Defines the automated logic used to adjust rates based on real-time market demand and booking patterns.
Monitors booking activity for the upcoming 14 days to identify the need for immediate pricing adjustments or promotions.
Sets strict limits on permissible discounts and additional fees to protect profit margins and maintain a high-end brand perception.
Provides a high-level rollup of gross revenue, taxes, and fees to track overall financial performance.
Compares platform payouts against expected revenue to identify and resolve any financial discrepancies.
Employs a "Defense-in-Depth" approach to ensure the property meets all local, state, and platform legal requirements.
Tracks the application and renewal status of all necessary short-term rental licenses `LCP-001_to_004_Permits_Verification_Execution_Prompt.md` through `LCP-004 `.
Centralizes critical insurance details, including limits and carrier info, to ensure the property is fully protected against liability.
Records registration details for Texas and Austin hotel occupancy taxes to ensure full compliance with local tax laws.
Monitors evolving local short-term rental codes and neighborhood-specific rules to avoid fines or legal issues.
Establishes legally enforceable conduct rules for guests to protect the property and ensure neighborhood harmony.
Maintains copies of signed contracts with cleaning teams, handymen, and other service providers to define clear expectations and terms.
Outlines the standard workflow for collecting evidence and filing damage claims through platform-based protection programs.
Implements an occupancy-based approach to property upkeep to minimize wear and tear and prevent costly emergency repairs.
Schedules and tracks recurring maintenance tasks `PM-001_to_007_Preventative_Maintenance_Execution_Prompt.md` through `PM-007 ` to extend the life of property assets.
Provides a rapid-response sign-off log for monthly visual inspections to catch minor issues before they escalate.
Maps out deep-cleaning and system inspections on a quarterly and annual basis to maintain a premium standard.
Records all reactive maintenance issues from reporting to resolution to track property maintenance history and costs.
Documents the dates and outcomes of official property inspections to ensure ongoing safety and code compliance.
Centralizes lifecycle, serial number, and warranty data for all major appliances and systems to simplify replacement planning.
Monitors monthly utility usage to identify potential leaks, inefficiencies, or system failures early.
Provides technical instructions and the location of emergency shut-offs for critical building systems.
Outlines clear protocols and identifies immediate vendor contacts for handling urgent property emergencies.
Maintains a reliable list of preferred and backup service providers to ensure the property is always well-supported.
Utilizes a 3-pillar model to analyze performance data and drive continuous improvement in the property's financial and guest outcomes.
Tracks key performance indicators like occupancy, ADR, and guest sentiment against pre-defined targets to gauge success.
Links specific data triggers to actionable operational or marketing changes to proactively manage property performance.
Collects raw weekly data on bookings, revenue, and expenses for deep-dive financial and operational analysis.
Aggregates guest review ratings across multiple categories to identify specific areas for experience enhancement.
Performs root-cause analysis on any sub-5-star reviews to implement systemic fixes and prevent repeat issues.
Evaluates the impact of pricing changes and discounts on booking volume to refine the overall revenue strategy.
Records the rationale behind weekly strategic decisions to build a database of successful management patterns.
